author: tersec
content: one hazard there is getting locked into a particular format of this, or continuing needing to implement out of some kind of general-beacon-API-backwards compability aspect a v1 even if a v2 or v3 format has already been agreed on. "tuning" doesn't really happen with standard beacon API endpoints this way

author: barnabasbusa
content: these fields are optional, so should be backwards compatible?

author: tersec
content: this seems as reasonable as any of the proposals

author: stefanbratanov
content: Makes sense to add it to the existing endpoint as well actually with the optional fields, happy with both options, one thing I am not sure about is limiting the downscore and disconnect reasons to an enum, clients can have their own other reasons, which are not specced and should be allowed to enter other strings

author: barnabasbusa
content: i’d propose to add the more reasons to the spec then?

author: barnabasbusa
content: Likely that the behavior you are downscoring for would also make sense to add as a category for other clients

author: barnabasbusa
content: Ideally we have a superset of all possible disconnect reasons among all the clients

author: barnabasbusa
content: and ideally we don’t have duplicates lol
